steps.title: Describe the storage mechanism
steps.content: The student wants to specify how the molten salt enables storage. The relevant notes give the mechanism: when the salt is liquid, energy flows through the battery; when the salt solidifies at room temperature, energy stops flowing and is stored. Reheating later releases that stored energy.

steps.title: Reject incomplete details
steps.content: Choice A names the salt's temperature behavior but omits the energy-storage effect. Choice B explains how stored energy is used later. Choice D gives a retention statistic without explaining how storage occurs. The useful sentence must state that solidification stops energy flow and allows storage. The answer is C.
